description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden wardrobe with a light oak finish, featuring three vertical doors and two horizontal drawers at the bottom. The front face displays subtle wood grain patterns and is equipped with sleek, metallic handles on both the doors and drawers. The sides are plain, showing the same wood texture without any additional features. The base of the wardrobe is slightly recessed, giving it a stable stance. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for storing clothes or other personal items. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the construction appears robust and practical for urban residential or office environments.
description: A tall, light oak-finished wardrobe with three doors and two drawers, featuring metallic handles and a modern, functional design.
description_view_0: The back of the wardrobe, plain and featureless with a smooth wood finish.
description_view_1: The left side of the wardrobe, showing a continuous wood grain pattern with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: The front of the wardrobe, displaying three doors with metallic handles and two drawers at the bottom, all in a light oak finish.
description_view_3: The right side of the wardrobe, similar to the left, with a plain wood grain surface and no visible features.
